capabilities.description: GSD-2 MCP Hub — 任务管理和 Agent 协调

Receives cross-project checkup events (bug reports from any project frontend) and routes them to the responsible project Agent via .inbox topic; mirrors each event to SOTAgent aggregation channel. Body must conform to Agent_core/contracts/checkup-event.schema.json.
Receives lobster inbox-outbox events and routes them to target agent .inbox topics via BroadcastPublisher. Semantically compatible with SOTAgent inbox-outbox.schema.json.
